name: CYM Rewards
description: Redeem USDC tokens for gift cards from 600+ brands across United States, Canada, Hong Kong, and United Kingdom. Browse, search, and redeem rewards via x402 protocol on Ethereum Mainnet. Supports USD, CAD, HKD, and GBP currencies with real-time FX conversion. Also offers Mastercard Prepaid cards in USD and GBP. Pricing: Card value + 1.5% service fee in USDC (all currencies).

skills.name: Search Gift Cards
skills.description: Search available gift cards by brand, country, or currency. Returns matching products with pricing and availability. Supports USD, CAD, HKD, and GBP currencies.
examples: What gift cards are available in Canada?
Search for Starbucks cards in Hong Kong

skills.name: Get Brand Details
skills.description: Get detailed information about a specific gift card brand including denominations, restrictions, and terms.
examples: Tell me about Starbucks gift cards
What denominations are available for iTunes?

skills.name: Redeem Gift Card
skills.description: Redeem USDC tokens for a gift card on Ethereum Mainnet. Voucher is delivered via email. Supports USD, CAD, HKD, and GBP denominations. A 1.5% service fee is applied.
examples: Redeem $50 for an Amazon gift card
Use USDC to get a 100 CAD Tim Hortons gift card
Redeem tokens for a 500 HKD Apple gift card

skills.name: Check Order Status
skills.description: Check the status of a reward redemption order and retrieve voucher details.
examples: What's the status of my order?

skills.name: Browse Rewards Catalog
skills.description: Interactive MCP App UI for browsing the rewards catalog with images, denomination selection, FX conversion preview, and checkout redirect.

skills.name: Search Mastercard Prepaid
skills.description: Search available Mastercard Prepaid cards. Returns Mastercard Prepaid products in USD and GBP.
examples: Show me Mastercard gift cards in GBP

skills.name: Redeem Mastercard Prepaid
skills.description: Redeem USDC tokens for a Mastercard Prepaid card on Ethereum Mainnet. Supports USD and GBP. A 1.5% service fee is applied.
examples: Redeem $100 for a Mastercard Prepaid card
Use USDC for a 50 GBP Mastercard
